feature_layout.name: my_active
feature_layout.description: My active mon: hp, knowledge flags, boosts, status, tera/item/ability flags, revealed moves hash, visible species hash.

feature_layout.name: opponent_active
feature_layout.description: Opponent active mon with the same feature template, masked to public information.

feature_layout.name: my_bench
feature_layout.description: Six bench slots: revealed flag, hp/fainted/tera, bench status, visible species hash.

feature_layout.name: opponent_bench
feature_layout.description: Opponent bench slots with the same bench template, masked to public information.

feature_layout.name: field
feature_layout.description: Weather plus global field conditions such as terrain or Trick Room.

feature_layout.name: my_side_conditions
feature_layout.description: My side's public side conditions such as rocks, spikes, screens, veil, and Tailwind.

turn_outcome_layout.name: my_pre_active_after
turn_outcome_layout.description: End-of-turn summary for my active that started the turn.

turn_outcome_layout.name: opponent_pre_active_after
turn_outcome_layout.description: End-of-turn summary for the opponent active that started the turn.

turn_outcome_layout.name: my_post_active
turn_outcome_layout.description: End-of-turn active on my side, including visible species hash.

turn_outcome_layout.name: opponent_post_active
turn_outcome_layout.description: End-of-turn active on the opponent side, including visible species hash.

turn_outcome_layout.name: active_changed_flags
turn_outcome_layout.description: Whether either side ended the turn with a different active.

turn_outcome_layout.name: field_after
turn_outcome_layout.description: Weather and global field conditions after the turn resolves.

turn_outcome_layout.name: my_side_conditions_after
turn_outcome_layout.description: My side conditions after the turn.

turn_outcome_layout.name: opponent_side_conditions_after
turn_outcome_layout.description: Opponent side conditions after the turn.
